security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.
An attacker can craft a malicious vote message that passes validation checks without proper authorization

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be tampered with without proper validation.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not sufficiently validate vote inputs.

assumptions: The governance contract does not validate vote data integrity.
The actor can modify the vote data before submission.
The system lacks mechanisms to detect vote tampering attempts

mitigation.strategy: Implement robust input validation and data integrity checks for vote messages.

description: An attacker may manipulate or alter vote data during submission, resulting in inaccurate voting results.

security_gap.gap_description: The system lacks mechanisms to prevent vote repudiation.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not provide mechanisms for verifiable vote casting.

assumptions: The system does not implement mechanisms to ensure vote provenance.
Actors are not required to provide non-repudiable proof of their votes.
An attacker could cast votes anonymously and deny their actions later

mitigation.strategy: Use a mechanism to create a non-repudiable audit trail for all votes cast.

description: An attacker may cast votes and subsequently deny their participation in the voting process.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be exposed to unauthorized parties.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system may not properly protect vote data privacy.

assumptions: The system does not encrypt vote data during transmission or storage.
The system does not implement appropriate access controls to protect vote data.
An attacker may exploit vulnerabilities to gain access to vote data

mitigation.strategy: Implement encryption of vote data both in transit and at rest, and restrict access based on roles.

description: An attacker may gain access to confidential vote data.
